_meta.derived_from: research/taxonomy/{bands.json,cells.json,FINDINGS.md} — 57,626 forward_obs on honest_objective (per-mint dedup) + 122 proceeds-era closes under the S105-audit concentration rule (>=8 mints, no mint >40%)
_meta.thesis: ONE legible 4x3 policy surface: plays collapsed 7+3-shadow -> 4 real cohorts (RUNNER/SCALP/DEEP/DUST), regimes collapsed 5 -> 3 (RISK_ON/NEUTRAL/RISK_OFF) with cutoffs derived from honest-EV separation, exits keyed on PLAY + POOL-DEPTH (EVOLVE-12), never on tape regime.
_meta.regime_naming_note: Honest EV falls MONOTONICALLY with global volume (lo +6.1pp / mid +0.3 / hi -0.1, 690/444/385 mints) — so RISK_ON = the QUIET tape (<$222k agg) and RISK_OFF = the high-volume meme-flood (>=$282k). This inverts the old ladder's euphoria/aggressive up-weighting, which was the proven-wrong assumption (S127 task A).
_meta.second_signal_test: vol_trend (eta2 0.0007) and frac_drain (0.0001) do NOT split the middle band better than nothing — plain 3 volume bands stand; no second axis earned a seat.

absorbs._DEEP_POOL_SKIP_REGIMES: DEEP row admit=frozen in ALL bands (S110 + kill_criterion FAIL n=35 — the freeze made legible, not negotiable)
absorbs.admit_guard force_skip (gem/relay x norm: SCALP row admit=skip in ALL bands (realized: RISK_ON -6.29pp/21 mints, NEUTRAL -12.34pp/12 mints — both meet the concentration rule and both are red; RISK_OFF is the worst forward band)
absorbs._REGIME_SIZE_MULT (0.85/1.0/0.7/0.45/0.2: retired -> tape_mult 1.0; per-cell size_mult owns sizing (the euphoria/aggressive up-weight was keyed on the inverted axis)
absorbs._BLEED_TRIM_POCKETS x0.5 (normal only): superseded by SCALP admit=skip (S117 stop-the-bleed, generalized to every band)
absorbs._NORMAL_DP_SIZE_MULT: normal_slice maps to DEEP (frozen); its canary is inert since S117 — cell unreachable
absorbs._MOMENTUM_OVERRIDE_SIZE_MULT (x0.5): absorbed into RUNNER cells size_mult=0.5 (main.py lane mult is skipped when the canary is ON — no double-trim)
absorbs.S127 depth no-trade belts (>=250k): kept as depth_belts per play (the S119-audit Jotchu glitch-admits were a $4.9M pool; runner cohort median liq $9.7k)
absorbs.regime_mom 5-way scale: NOT in this table — scoring keeps the legacy 5-band internally until the reader/scorer migration (named follow-up); policy decisions here never key on the 5 names
absorbs.exit canary zoo (_deep_pool_ride/_moment: named exit families below; on a canary-ON bot the family resolver supersedes the per-canary _on() reads (byte-equivalent mapping, tested); the 4 json canary files remain the masters for control bots until the post-proof retirement

_meta.frozen_note: DEEP and DUST rows are hardcoded in regime_policy.py — a tampered table cannot re-enable DEEP or block/count DUST.
_meta.follow_up_named: reader migration (edge_report/prestige_tracker/lane_watch/kill_criterion read play_v2/regime_v2 tags) + physical deletion of the 5-band ladder, regime_mom table, STOIC->bank hardcode, and the 4 exit canary files — AFTER the watcher proves the canary.

regimes_v2.evidence: grid search, dedup eta2 0.0205 (best of 153 cut pairs, each band >=15% share); band honest-EV means +6.13 / +0.29 / -0.14 pp; RUNNER cohort positive in all three (+16.0/+13.1/+12.5); flips/day 80.9 raw -> 51.6 at +/-10% hysteresis
regimes_v2.shim_note: name-level shim is lossy: legacy `normal` ($110-280k) straddles c1 — its 222-280k sliver is truly NEUTRAL but shims to RISK_ON. Live tagging stamps the exact band from agg at open; the shim is the fallback for restart-survivor positions and historical reads.

RUNNER.note: the validated +EV lane, promoted to a first-class play (mint-bootstrap CI [+27,+41], OOS +16%, 220 mints — S118)

SCALP.note: merge evidence: pool dedup -9.78pp/23 mints; bank -5.77/9 mints, mean_reversion -15.05/4, highconv n=0 — none distinct (>5pp at >=8 mints) -> FOLD. The STOIC->bank hardcode is retired SEMANTICALLY here (bot3 rows = SCALP like everyone; the legacy param key survives only until the follow-up).

DEEP.note: bookkeeping row ONLY — disproven (kill_criterion FAIL), disarmed, frozen; visible in the grid instead of tagged off-site

DUST.note: shadow probes — excluded from live gates, governed by their own canary; the resolver never blocks or counts them

grid_note: SCALP size_mult 0.5 is dormant while admit=skip — it is the pre-agreed posture IF the operator re-opens a SCALP cell (edit admit to 'reduced'); re-opening is a one-line table edit, not code.

RIDE_TIGHT.note: the deep_pool/brain_rule ride (EVOLVE12 act+5, SL -10, smart trail, no fixed-TP bank) — DEEP positions keep exactly this (S110: no exit change)

RIDE_WIDE.note: the runner / momentum-gem / small-pool ride (act +10, SL -10, no fixed-TP bank; runner_freeride wide buffers + house_money compose as overlays)

BANK.note: fixed TP/SL + TP1 partial — the classic bank-param exit (legacy bank/stoic positions)

SCALP_OUT.note: tier TP/SL + smart trail — the default price-action exit

exit_resolution.RUNNER: RIDE_WIDE (all depths it can enter; belt <=250k)
exit_resolution.SCALP: RIDE_WIDE when entry_liq < 50000 (vol_accel small-pool cohort) OR (50000 <= entry_liq < 250000 AND tier in [gem, momentum] AND momentum_at_entry >= 3) — the Jotchua signature; BANK when the position carries bank params; SCALP_OUT otherwise
exit_resolution.DUST: whatever family its fields resolve to (dust rides the real exit machinery)
